required_preferences.fact: Takes prescribed daily medication for tension headaches per doctor's orders and only uses pain relief patches for breakthrough pain

supersedes.fact: Keeps pain relief patches in her desk drawer and applies one for headaches instead of taking medication whenever possible

required_preferences.fact: Practices guided meditation nightly without using a screen, switching to audio-only or offline prompts per doctor's recommendation to reduce evening screen time

supersedes.fact: Practices guided meditation nightly using her favorite app—never skips it, even when tired

required_preferences.fact: Books tickets for concerts and live music events at least once a month—never attends sporting events
Brings dairy-free snacks to the office—never touches anything from the shared fridge unless she checks the label
Sets a reminder to drink a glass of water before every client call—never relies on coffee alone for hydration
Completes assigned physical therapy exercises at home each morning before work, following the therapist’s instructions

persona: A 28-year-old account executive at a fast-growing SaaS startup
